ModMetaData.name: RimClaim
ModMetaData.author: RimClaim
ModMetaData.description:
A bespoke player-sovereignty multiplayer layer built on Zetrith's Multiplayer mod.
Features: - Landclaim territory system with per-claim tick rate control - Per-player ownership of buildings, items, and zones - Team system with granular shared-access permissions - Player diplomacy, PVP, and steal mechanics - Negotiated pause system with per-claim speed hooks - Fair round-robin event targeting scaled to player count - Gravship co-launch coordination with boarding readiness - Trade isolation to player's claim only - Ceremony and DLC compatibility
Requires Zetrith's Multiplayer and Harmony.
